name: Easy Chickpea Dish
recipeIngredient: 1/2 small can tomato sauce (made of tomatoes and water)
1 small container Dannon no-fat blended French vanilla yogurt
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat cumin seeds in a pot.
2. Add tomato sauce and curry to taste.
3. Simmer until the curry and cumin are well absorbed.
4. Add chickpeas and heat until hot, but do not overcook (chickpeas should retain some texture).
5. Remove from heat and stir in half of the yogurt.
6. Serve over rice, with the remaining yogurt on the side if desired.
